## twoWay() function

Creates a default binding.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function twoWay<T = any>(expression: Expression<T>, optionsOrChangeEvent?: TwoWayBindingOptions | string, policy?: DOMPolicy, isBindingVolatile?: boolean): Binding<T>;
```
